def calculate_area(width: float, height: float) -> float:
    return width * height

def is_even(number: int) -> bool:
    return number % 2 == 0

def get_first_item(items: list):
    return items[0]

def merge_dicts(dict1: dict, dict2: dict) -> dict:
    return {**dict1, **dict2}

def format_name(first: str, last: str) -> str:
    return f"{first} {last}"
